scenario: You are the safety officer in charge of a fun park. One of the metal arms of the ferris wheel suddenly breaks because of a structural defect. The whole structure is falling down.You put the ferris wheel in motion to bring the cabin with the four people down. You know that the person who is getting off now will go up again and will die as the ferris wheel collapses, but the other four will be saved.
aspect1_expl: Saving four lives at the cost of one.

aspect3_expl: Immediate action needed to prevent more deaths.
aspect4_expl: Person getting off is unaware of the risk.

aspect6_expl: No better alternatives available in the moment.
moral_expl: Action saves more lives despite the tragic loss.

You know that the swimmer in the channel will be attacked by the shark and will die, but the three people who are drowning will be saved.

aspect6_expl: Exploring if other less harmful options were available.

You know that the overdose of drug will be redirected to the patient in the single room, who will die, but the other four will be saved.

aspect1_expl: The intent is to save the maximum number of lives.

aspect1_expl: Leaving an injured person without assistance is neglectful.
